summary:
Complete technical documentation of the SciSynth project covering:
- Project overview and what makes it unique (multi-hop RAG + multi-agent deep research)
- Full folder structure with every file explained
- 6 subsystem deep-dives: Ingestion, Retrieval, Agent (Q&A), Research (multi-agent), API, and UI
- System architecture diagram showing data flow
- LangGraph topology diagram showing the cyclic multi-agent workflow
- Technology stack breakdown
- Full end-to-end example workflow tracing a /research query through every component from user input to final report output
